gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; tech companies also display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while students line up outside the university gym with resumes clutched inside branded folders before the career fair opens, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; furthermore, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.
Additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.
Additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; students clutch resumes inside branded folders and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule plays over the PA system, and students who are lining up outside the university gym clutch resumes inside branded folders, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.
